_note: HIVE-341 — pinned model set + seeds for the compounding run. Supersedes the HIVE-266 lineup (DeepSeek/GLM-4.6/Kimi-K2.5/GPT-5.5/Opus). OpenRouter slugs are best-effort and MUST be verified against the live OpenRouter model list before a run (see README caution).
invariants: GLM-4.6 is FIXED as the smart-prompts rewriter AND the reflect-and-store model across EVERY arm, so the helper LLM is never a per-arm confound; the only variable is the agent model.
Each condition (repo x model x mode) runs with its own memory-off twin on identical slices in identical order.
Sonnet 5 doubles as the frontier reference the cheaper open models are chasing.
